Item 5.07
Submission of Matters to a Vote of Security Holders.
The 2023 Annual Meeting of Shareholders (the “Annual Meeting”) of Apple Inc. (“Apple”) was held on March 10, 2023. At the Annual Meeting, Apple’s shareholders voted on the following
        nine proposals and cast their votes as described below.
1.
The individuals listed below were elected at the Annual Meeting to serve as directors of Apple until the next annual meeting of shareholders and until their successors are duly elected and qualified:
